name: Acme Corp
usage: down 30% over the last 45 days; daily active users declining

interactions.text: Customer profile — Industry: Logistics SaaS. Company size: 520 employees. Primary use case: workflow automation across operations teams. Contract value: $200k ARR.
QBR with Acme: their CFO is worried about ROI and whether the platform justifies the cost ahead of renewal.
Support tickets from Acme spiked this month; several users reported confusion with the new workflow.
Acme renewal date set for 2026-08-10. Account flagged amber by the CSM.
Acme product usage dropped 30% over the last 45 days; daily active users declining.
Champion at Acme emailed asking for a summary of value delivered this year for their finance team.

name: Globex Inc
usage: high; the analytics team is at 90% of their licensed seats

interactions.text: Customer profile — Industry: Analytics & BI. Company size: 300 employees. Primary use case: self-serve analytics for data teams. Contract value: $120k ARR.
Globex analytics team loves the product and mentioned onboarding two more sub-teams next quarter.
Globex is at 90% of their licensed seats; power users are requesting more access.
Globex champion asked about volume pricing for adding a large group of new seats.

name: Initech
usage: steady; healthy weekly active users across teams

interactions.text: Customer profile — Industry: Fintech. Company size: 180 employees. Primary use case: compliance reporting. Contract value: $75k ARR.
Initech QBR was positive; the team is happy and using core features consistently.
Initech usage is steady with healthy weekly active users across teams.
Initech account health is green; no concerns flagged this quarter and strong product fit.
